rules.title: Access Control
rules.description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain ePHI
rules.remediation: Implement unique user identification, emergency access procedures, automatic logoff, and encryption/decryption mechanisms.

rules.title: Audit Controls
rules.description: Implement hardware, software, and procedural mechanisms to record and examine access to ePHI
rules.remediation: Implement comprehensive audit logging that captures all ePHI access with user identification, timestamps, and actions performed.

rules.title: Integrity Controls
rules.description: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction
rules.remediation: Implement data integrity mechanisms including checksums, digital signatures, and regular backup procedures.

rules.title: Person or Entity Authentication
rules.description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is the one claimed
rules.remediation: Implement multi-factor authentication and strong password policies. Use industry-standard authentication protocols.

rules.title: Transmission Security
rules.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI being transmitted
rules.remediation: Use TLS 1.2+ for all network transmissions. Implement end-to-end encryption for ePHI in transit.

rules.title: Encryption and Decryption
rules.description: Implement mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI
rules.remediation: Implement AES-256 encryption for ePHI at rest. Use strong key management practices.
